VAL-CROSS-001.details: Both parts of the assertion passed. Part 1: Navigating to /my without authentication redirected to /login?callbackUrl=%2Fmy. After logging in with test@example.com/password123, user landed on /my (the originally requested page). Part 2: Navigating directly to /login (no callbackUrl) and logging in redirected user to / (Goods home page) as expected.

steps.action: Fill email: test@example.com, password: password123, click Login
steps.observed: Login succeeded, redirected to http://localhost:3100/my (My profile page with menu items visible)

steps.action: Clear cookies and navigate directly to /login (no callbackUrl)
steps.expected: Login page shown at /login without callbackUrl

steps.action: Fill email: test@example.com, password: password123, click Login
steps.expected: Login succeeds and redirect to / (Goods home page)
steps.observed: Login succeeded, redirected to http://localhost:3100/ (Goods home page with banner carousel and product search)

VAL-CROSS-001.consoleErrors: Pre-existing 'Invalid or unexpected token' error (not related to redirect flow)

frictions.description: On first attempt, form fields appeared to clear after initial fill (possibly due to React re-render with useSession status change). Required re-snapshotting to get correct refs before filling again. Second attempt with fresh cookies worked smoothly with a 5-second wait after login click.
frictions.resolution: Used fresh cookie clear, immediate fill after snapshot, and 5-second wait after login click for reliable redirect detection.

summary: Tested VAL-CROSS-001 (both parts): PASS. Part 1: Unauthenticated /my access redirects to /login?callbackUrl=%2Fmy, and after login user lands on /my. Part 2: Direct /login access (no callbackUrl) redirects to / (Goods home) after login.
